_comment: Source: Screenshot_20260430-225253.png. Chinese Traditional UI. DIFFERENT EVENT вҖ” 2026-04-30 15:00 Trap 2 hunt. The 'chinese_cht' engine drops the surrounding brackets on '[зӢ©зҚөйҷ·йҳұ2]', so `_BRACKETED_TRAP_RE` misses; `_HEADERLESS_TRAP_RE` recovers the trap by matching `зӢ©зҚөйҷ·йҳұ(\d)`.
